features: Relieve and repair skin: This nourishing, soothing body oil spray with a silky finish helps relieve and repair very dry skin from the first application by providing long-lasting moisturisation all-day
Unique formula: The fast-absorbing dermatologist-tested oil spray contains Oat Oil and Jojoba Oil, which are ingredients rich in lipids and fatty acids, helping to restore the skin's natural barrier
Suitable for sensitive skin: The Aveeno body oil contains 98% naturally derived ingredients. It is hypoallergenic* and suitable for use on very dry, sensitive skin and for a massage
Application instructions: Use the body oil spray twice daily, best after washing. Spray close onto skin and massage. WARNING: Do not spray near eyes or face. Use with caution; floor may be slippery
Product details: Aveeno Skin Relief Body Oil Spray (1x 200ml), oil spray for nourishing and relieving dry, sensitive skin, full-body moisturising oil with Jojoba and Oat Oil extracts
description: Product Description " Aveeno Skin Relief Body Oil Spray (1x 200ml) — Soothe your skin, naturally Provide your skin with a boost of silky moisture with this essential body oil from Aveeno. The formula contains 98% naturally derived ingredients and is dermatologist-tested to suit very dry, sensitive skin. It contains Jojoba Oil and Oat Oil, each rich in fatty acids and lipids, which boost the health of the skin's natural barrier, improving its elasticity and uneven skin texture. Skin will be left feeling softer, smoother, and more hydrated immediately after use—96% of users have agreed skin felt instantly soft when using this oil**. Dry skin is relieved and repaired from the first application, providing long-lasting moisturisation. The Body Oil Spray can even be used as a massage oil. Application instructions: Use the body oil spray twice daily, best after washing. Spray close onto skin and massage. WARNING: Do not spray near eyes or face. Use with caution; floor may be slippery. Product Benefits at A Glance Relieving body oil spray For sensitive and dehydrated skin With Jojoba and Oat Oil 98% naturally derived ingredients 1x 200ml *Formulated to minimise the risk of allergies **Home use test, 29 participants (2019); Clinical study, 26 participants (2019) " Ingredients Glycine Soja Oil, Avena Sativa Kernel (Oat) Oil, Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil, Lecithin, Ascorbyl Palmitate, Tocopherol, Parfum. [PR-0001757] Directions Use twice daily, best after washing. Spray close to towel dried skin, massage in. Safety Warning Warnings: do not spray near eyes or face. Use caution, as floor may become slippery during use. Manufacturer Contact Information GB: Johnson & Johnson Ltd.
